title: All you need: Crystal PVP
description: This modpack contains all you need to become a better or the best CPVPer! In here you will find only the necessary mods making this a super lightweight modpack for all users!
body:
**ALL YOU NEED FOR CRYSTAL PVP (CPVP):**
The Crystal PvP Modpack is built for fast-paced, high-stakes PvP, focusing on crystal combat mechanics and overall performance. It includes a mix of combat-enhancing mods and optimizations to keep fights smooth and responsive.

**Features:**

-Marlow's crystal optimizer

-Sodium & sodium extras

-Freecam

-Motion blur

-Low fire & shield (optional)

-Quiet crystals (optional)

-Totem Counter

-No crystal particles

This modpack **actually aims to make you a better cpvper**, and keeping it at the **basics** so your performance isn't down! **Hope this helps**
